_comment: Metriques par cycle -- remplace METRICS.md. Ecrit par merlin-qa-lead apres chaque cycle.
commits: cycle-18: ogham unlock progression + per-run anam + landes batch3
notes: Cycle 18: T049 Ogham unlock at rep=50 (Store.addReputation + CustomEvent + toast in main.ts, faction->ogham map: druides=coll,anciens=ailm,korrigans=onn,niamh=saille,ankou=eadhadh) + T050 anamThisRun counter in RunState (reset on startRun, incremented by addAnam, shown in RunSummary as 'Anam cette quete' vs 'Anam total') + T051 landes_bruyere batch3 (20 cards, 286 total, 14/20 niamh options, druides=2/20, HEAL<=5 PASS). Bundle app +1.54KB (96.83->98.37). TS: 0 errors. Build: 2.01s. All gates PASS.
